description_long: This is a tall, rectangular apartment building with a symmetrical facade and a modern, utilitarian design. The exterior is primarily composed of gray concrete panels interspersed with vertical bands of reddish-brown brickwork, giving it a distinctive striped appearance. Rows of evenly spaced windows run vertically along the building, with each floor featuring a consistent window arrangement. The roof is flat and features some small rooftop structures and antennae, typical of high-rise residential buildings. The base of the building is slightly wider, suggesting a reinforced foundation or lobby area. There are no visible balconies, and the entrance appears to be a standard ground-level access point.
description: A tall, modern apartment building with gray concrete and reddish-brown brick stripes, featuring rows of evenly spaced windows and a flat roof.
description_view_0: Side view showing the building's narrow profile, vertical window rows, and alternating concrete and brick stripes.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide facade, symmetrical window arrangement, and prominent vertical brick bands.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the narrow profile and consistent window pattern.
description_view_3: Rear or alternate front view, mirroring view 1 with the same wide facade and window organization.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in vertical columns with uniform spacing, creating a highly symmetrical and repetitive pattern across all visible facades.
